project.name: PA Restanță Study App
project.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 + custom CSS variables (dark theme)

codebase_layout.src/types/: TypeScript interfaces (Topic, QuizQuestion, QuizSet, PracticeExam, etc.)

data_files.topics.ts: 10 topics: kmp, bm, dp1, dp2, greedy, bkt, analiza, nedet, prob, regex
data_files.quizzes.ts: Barrel file aggregating quiz sets from 4 split files
data_files.kmp-bm-quizzes.ts: KMP + BM quizzes (5 difficulty levels each, 8-10 questions)
data_files.topicQuizzes.ts: DP1 + DP2 + Greedy quizzes (5 difficulty levels each, 8-10 questions)
data_files.quizSets.ts: BKT + Analiza + Nedet quizzes (5 difficulty levels each, 8-10 questions)
data_files.prob-regex-quizzes.ts: Prob + Regex quizzes (5 difficulty levels each, 8-10 questions)

screens_and_features.LandingPage: Topic cards grid, click to start learning, shows progress per topic
screens_and_features.LearnPage: 4-step flow: Theory → Code → Simulator → Quiz. Has difficulty selector for quizzes.
screens_and_features.PracticePage: Exam listing + problem browser with hints/solution toggle
screens_and_features.Quiz: Round-based: wrong questions retaken, correct questions skipped. localStorage progress persistence.
screens_and_features.Simulators: KMP (interactive failure function + search), BM, DP (matrix traversal)

progress.scope: Per-browser only, no sync across devices

done: Initial scaffold: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind + zustand + framer-motion
Created 10 topic entries with descriptions, keyPoints, codeExamples from course PDFs
Created 460+ quiz questions across 10 topics, each with 5 difficulty levels (Începător→Expert)
Quiz retake logic: only wrong questions are re-asked, not all
Quiz difficulty selector UI in LearnPage
7 partial exams + 10 model exams with problem statements and solutions transcribed from PDFs
Initial commit and push to GitHub, deployed on Vercel

conventions.language: Romanian for all text content (UI, questions, explanations, code comments)
conventions.data_pattern: Topics use markdown descriptions, quizzes use QuizSet[] with difficulty levels
